deploy.startCommand: php artisan optimize:clear || true; php artisan config:clear || true; php artisan route:clear || true; php artisan view:clear || true; php artisan cache:clear || true; php artisan app:guard-production-database; php artisan migrate --force; php artisan app:ensure-admin; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=${PORT:-8000}
